title: Design System: Plaud Mirror Operator Panel

mono.purpose: Ids, times, counts, and compact state.

motion.name: state
motion.purpose: Hover and state feedback without decorative choreography.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary command in an operator task.
components.css: .ds-primary { background:#0f7a5a; color:#fbfbfc; border:0; border-radius:8px; padding:11px 18px; font:600 14px Archivo,system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-primary:hover { background:#0b684c; } .ds-primary:focus-visible { outline:3px solid #add9ca; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Destructive Secondary Button
components.description: Explicit text command for an irreversible Plaud mutation.
components.css: .ds-danger { background:#fbfbfc; color:#a92b25; border:1px solid #ecd3d1; border-radius:8px; padding:6px 10px; min-height:32px; font:600 12px Archivo,system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-danger:hover { background:#fff2f1; } .ds-danger:focus-visible { outline:3px solid #f4cfcc; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: State Pill
components.description: Compact text-backed recording or runtime state.
components.css: .ds-pill { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; min-height:24px; border:1px solid #e1d1aa; border-radius:999px; padding:3px 8px; background:#fbf4df; color:#7c5a13; font:500 11px 'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-input { width:100%; border:1px solid #d8dbe0; border-radius:8px; padding:9px 12px; background:#fbfbfc; color:#1a1d21; font:400 14px Archivo,system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline:3px solid #add9ca; outline-offset:1px; border-color:#0f7a5a; }

components.name: Rail Navigation Item
components.description: Full-width view selector in the operator rail.
components.css: .ds-nav { width:100%; border:0; border-radius:8px; padding:9px 11px; background:#f1f2f4; color:#4a4e55; text-align:left; font:500 14px Archivo,system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-nav:hover { background:#e7e9ec; color:#1a1d21; } .ds-nav:focus-visible { outline:3px solid #add9ca; outline-offset:1px; }

narrative.overview: A full-viewport, restrained light console where state and ownership boundaries carry the visual hierarchy. It should disappear into repeated recording work and become more explicit only when an action is risky or the runtime is degraded.

rules.name: Ownership before action
rules.body: Every command names whether it changes local storage, Plaud, or downstream state.

rules.name: Semantic restraint
rules.body: Green, amber, red, and blue are reserved for real state or action meaning.

donts: Conflate local dismissal with Plaud deletion
Claim success before the API returns
